= rpk redpanda admin brokers
:description: View and configure Redpanda brokers through the admin listener.
:page-platforms: linux,darwin

// This content is autogenerated. Do not edit manually. To customize content, see the writer's guide: https://github.com/redpanda-data/docs-extensions-and-macros/blob/main/docs-data/RPK_OVERRIDES_GUIDE.adoc

// tag::single-source[]
View and configure Redpanda brokers through the admin listener.

== Usage

[,bash]
----
rpk redpanda admin brokers [flags]
----




== Subcommands

[cols="1,2a"]
|===
|Command |Description

|xref:reference:rpk/rpk-redpanda/rpk-redpanda-admin-brokers-decommission.adoc[`rpk redpanda admin brokers decommission`]
|Decommission the given broker. Decommissioning a broker removes it from the cluster.

|xref:reference:rpk/rpk-redpanda/rpk-redpanda-admin-brokers-decommission-status.adoc[`rpk redpanda admin brokers decommission-status`]
|Show the progress of a node decommissioning. When a node is being decommissioned, this command reports the decommissioning progress as follows, where PARTITION-SIZE is in bytes.

|xref:reference:rpk/rpk-redpanda/rpk-redpanda-admin-brokers-list.adoc[`rpk redpanda admin brokers list`]
|List the brokers in your cluster. This command lists all brokers in the cluster, active and inactive, unless they have been decommissioned.

|xref:reference:rpk/rpk-redpanda/rpk-redpanda-admin-brokers-recommission.adoc[`rpk redpanda admin brokers recommission`]
|Recommission the given broker if is is still decommissioning. Recommissioning can stop an active decommission.

|===


== Global flags

[cols="1m,1a,2a"]
|===
|Value |Type |Description

|--config |string |Redpanda or `rpk` config file; default search paths are `/Users/jakecahill/Library/Application Support/rpk/rpk.yaml`, `$PWD/redpanda.yaml`, and `/etc/redpanda/redpanda.yaml`.
|-X, --config-opt |stringArray |Override `rpk` configuration settings; `-X help` for detail or `-X list` for terser detail.
|--ignore-profile |bool |Ignore `rpk.yaml` and `redpanda.yaml`; use default settings.
|--profile |string |`rpk` profile to use.
|-v, --verbose |bool |Enable verbose logging.
|===

// end::single-source[]
